title: Huepar 4x360 Laser Level Self-Leveling 16 Lines 4D Green Lazer Level Cross Lines Tiling Floor Laser Tool-2 x 360 Horizontal & 2 x 360 Vertical Lazer Lines with Two Li-ion Batteries and Hard Carry Case
features: 4 X 360° WITH TOP & FLOOR LINE LASER: This laser tool provides four 360 planes of laser light. The top 360° horizontal line can be used for ceiling installation. The 360° floor horizontal line is for tiling installation. With the lifting base, the 360° floor laser can raise from the surface to project over and travel past uneven surfaces or obstructions between 2.5 cm and 8.9 cm height. Two 360° vertical lines cross at 90°angles makes user quickly visualize and finish square layout.

TWO BATTERIES & TYPE-C CHARGING PORT: The Huepar LS04CG laser level comes with 2 x 5200 mAh lithium-ion batteries for convenient replacement and continuous use. 4 indicators on the battery let users know the current battery level and charge status. There is a Type-C charging port on the batteries that can be charged separately, and the battery can also be charged by phone, laptop, power bank, car charger, etc.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL LASER TOOL: The four 360° laser planes can be selected individually by separate H and V button on the keypad. With smart pendulum, the laser tool self levels and indicates out-of-level condition while pendulum unlocked. The line laser will beep when out of self-leveling range ±4°. Once pendulum locked, it switches to manual mode to lock lines for use at any angle. Pulse mode extends laser range up to 60M with Huepar Laser Receiver LR-6RG.

MAGNETIC BRACKET&PORTABLE DESIGN: 360°Strong magnetic bracket allows for quick positioning to metal surfaces to hang the laser tool for wall applications and offers 1/4"-20 and 5/8"-11 mounting threads to suit for different tripod threads. There is also a 1/4"-20 female thread on the laser level to mount it to tripod or laser mounting pole. IP54 waterproof and dustproof, shockproof, wear resistant, impact resistance, cold and high temperature. The laser window can be removed and replaced.

BRIGHTER GREEN LASER: This cross line laser adopts the bright Upgraded imported’s green laser unit, which is resistant to temperature changes and has higher stability. At the same power, the green laser is twice bright as the red laser, with a working range of up to 85 feet (300LUX) of accuracy within ±1/9 Inch at 33 Feet.

PACKAGE CONTENTS&WARRANTY: The kit has a hard carry case bringing much more convenience to carry and store the laser tool. Package includes 4D tiling Laser level, 2 x Li-ion battery, Type-C cord, Power adapter, Lifting Base, Laser Target plate, Magnetic bracket, Hard carry case, user manual. Huepar is committed to provide Best-in-Class service to our customers- 24/7 Service Team（response in 24hrs & solution in 48hrs）; Lifetime Customer Support(hassle-free of exceeding the warranty).
description: Product Description LS04CG 4 x 360° Green Beam Floor Laser Level Specifications: Laser Class: Class 2 (IEC/EN60825-1/2014), <1mW power output Number of Lines: Two 360° horizontal floor laser lines & Two 360° Vertical laser lines Laser Wavelength: 505-520nm Horizontal/Vertical Accuracy: ±3mm/10m (±1/9 inch at 33Ft). Leveling/Compensation Range: ±4° Working Distance (Line): 30m , >50m with Huepar Receiver LR-5RG/LR-6RG Power Source: 2 x 5200mAh Li-ion batteries Operating Time with one Lithium Battery: >5 hours with all laser beams on Charging Time: 5 hours IP Rating: IP54 dust-proof, waterproof and shockproof, reliable and tough Mount Size: 1/4"-20 Package: Hard Carry Case WARNING: Do not point the laser beam directly into the eyes. The device is a laser class 2 laser product according to IEC / EN60825-1 / 2014. It is allowed to use the device without any further safety precautions. Two 5200mAh Rechargeable Li-ion Batteries & Type-C Charging Port This laser tool utilizes the 3.7V / 5200mAh Li-ion battery. An extra battery pack is included in the package for backup. A Type-C charging port on the Li-ion battery enables to be charged separately. The battery can also be charged by phone, laptop, power bank, car charger, etc. 4 battery indicators on the Li-ion battery pack allow users to know current battery level and charging status. 4 X 360°Laser Lines Switching This laser tool provides four 360 planes of laser light. The top 360° horizontal line can be used for ceiling installation. The 360° floor horizontal line is for tiling installation. Two 360° vertical lines cross at 90°angles that makes user quickly visualize and finish square layout. Short press the "H" and "V" buttons on the keypad to switch the Horizontal and Vertical laser lines separately. 360° Horizontal Floor Laser & Lifting Base Huepar LS04CG floor laser tool generates one 360° horizontal tiling laser on the floor or wall providing all-around leveling coverage for the layout of tile, stone, brick, carpet and hardwood flooring. With the lifting base, the laser lines raise from the surface to project over and travel past uneven surfaces or obstructions between 1"/2.6cm and 3.54"/8cm height. Pulse Mode After power on, short press the power button to switch ON/OFF the pulse mode. Pulse mode extends the working range up to 60m/200Ft in brighter working conditions when using with Huepar Line Laser Receiver. It is compatible with Huepar LR-6RG / LR-5RG Laser Detector only. Note: Keep the pulse mode on when using with a receiver. Self-leveling mode & Manual mode Self-leveling mode: Once the pendulum unlocked, the self-leveling mode is enabled. The laser beam will beep as well as the laser beam blink fast when the tool is out of self-leveling range ±4°. Manual mode: When the pendulum is in the locked position, the laser tool can be placed for use at any angle. The laser beam will blink every 3-5 seconds to remind you it's not self-leveling now. 360° Magnetic Bracket & Mounting Thread The included 360° strong magnetic bracket allows for quick positioning to metal surfaces, helping hang the laser level for wall applications. And the 1/4"-20 and 5/8"-11 mounting threads on the bottom of the bracket can suit for different tripod threads. There is also a 1/4"-20 female thread on the laser level to mount it to tripod or laser mounting Durable Design & Hard Cary Case The kit has a hard carry case bringing much more convenience to carry and store the laser tool. The laser window cover is replaceable that can be removed and replaced with a screwdriver. IP54 waterproof and dustproof, shockproof, wear resistant, impact resistance, cold and high temperature with stands tough worksite conditions, making it more reliable to use. Package Contents 1 x 4D Green Tiling Laser Level LS04CG 2 x Rechargeable Li-ion Batteries 1 x Hard Carry Case 1 x 360° Magnetic Bracket 1 x Lifting Base 1 x Power Adapter& Type-C cord 1 x Green Laser Target Plate 1 x Lase Level User Manual Huepar 10.8V / 2600mAh Li-ion Battery Huepar 3.7V / 5200mAh Li-ion Battery Huepar 3.7V / 5200mAh Li-ion Battery P04CG Bluetooth 4D 16 Lignes Laser 704CG 4x360 Niveau Laser Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews — — — 4.5 out of 5 stars 107 — Explanation Only Applicable to Huepar Laser Level Only Applicable to Huepar Laser Level Only Applicable to Huepar Laser Level H: 360°/ V: 360° H: 360°/ V: 360° Suitable for models P02CG/P03CG/P03DG/P04CG GF360G LS03CG/ LS03DG/ LS04CG/ LS11G/ LS21G/ LS41G/ L011G/ NT411G X X Machine ASINs that can be used with B09JC5C7PD/ B09JC6Q1P6/ B09JC67DCF/ B09JC643Q9 B07L69ZS6N B08Y5M8LHS/ B09GM418LZ/ B09GM2P1MM/ B0B2P7B9VQ/ B095K61G61/B095VXQLDN/ B08YN3WJJT X X Shelf life 2 years (only replacement, no repair) 2 years (only replacement, no repair) 2 years (only replacement, no repair) 2 years (only replacement, no repair) 2 years (only replacement, no repair) Operating time 10 hours with all laser beams on 6 hours continual use with all laser beams on. 8 hours continual use with all laser beams on. 8 hours continual use with all laser beams on. 8 hours continual use with all laser beams on.
